name: venom-tokenpilot
description: Stateful VS Code companion for Claude Code — lean artifacts, prompt packets, persistent brain memory.

commands.title: Venom's Token Pilot: Refresh Project Map
Venom's Token Pilot: Copy Prompt Packet
Venom's Token Pilot: Promote Insight → Brain
Venom's Token Pilot: Toggle Agent Mode
Venom's Token Pilot: Copy MCP Registration Snippet
Venom's Token Pilot: Merge Brain Updates

tokenPilot.autoSetupMode.description: How to handle missing artifacts on workspace open. 'prompt' asks, 'trustedSilent' auto-creates in trusted workspaces, 'off' disables.

tokenPilot.autoRefreshOnManifestChange.description: Auto-refresh project.md when package.json or pyproject.toml changes.

tokenPilot.claudeMdMaxLines.description: Warn when CLAUDE.md exceeds this line count. Each line is re-sent every message.

tokenPilot.claudeMdMaxTokens.description: Warn when CLAUDE.md estimated tokens (chars/4) exceed this value.

tokenPilot.detectClaudeMdDuplicates.description: Experimental: warn when CLAUDE.md prose appears to duplicate project.md content.

tokenPilot.brainMaxLines.description: Warn and offer Prune when .agent/brain.md exceeds this line count.

tokenPilot.includeBrainInPacket.description: Include brain.md live-state sections (Status, Active Task, Pending, Decisions) in prompt packets.

tokenPilot.agentMode.description: Packet format: 'claudeCode' includes @-paths, 'hitl' formats for claude.ai paste.

tokenPilot.packetMaxAtPaths.description: Warn when a prompt packet includes more than this many @-paths.
